'''rangate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:yellowishly|yellowishly]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| r-ng-m
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:yellowishly|yellowishly]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| rangate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:rangate|rangate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:rangatesher|rangatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:rangatesherĂ«m|rangatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:rangatero|rangatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:rangateshĂ«|rangateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:rangateshĂ«m|rangateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokirangatero|gokirangatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokirangateshĂ«|gokirangateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokirangateshĂ«m|gokirangateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gorangankerom|gorangankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gorangankeshĂ«|gorangankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gorangankeshĂ«m|gorangankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gorangankeya|gorangankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:rangaterom|rangaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:rangatemu|rangatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:rangateya|rangateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokirangaterom|gokirangaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokirangatemu|gokirangatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokirangateya|gokirangateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:rangangate|rangangate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:rangangatesher|rangangatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:rangangatesherĂ«m|rangangatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:rangangatero|rangangatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:rangangateshĂ«|rangangateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:rangangateshĂ«m|rangangateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokirangangatero|gokirangangatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokirangangateshĂ«|gokirangangateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokirangangateshĂ«m|gokirangangateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gorangangankerom|gorangangankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gorangangankeshĂ«|gorangangankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gorangangankeshĂ«m|gorangangankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gorangangankeya|gorangangankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:rangangaterom|rangangaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:rangangatemu|rangangatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:rangangateya|rangangateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokirangangaterom|gokirangangaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokirangangatemu|gokirangangatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokirangangateya|gokirangangateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:rĂŠngĂŠte|rĂŠngĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:rĂŠngĂŠtesher|rĂŠngĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:rĂŠngĂŠtesherĂ«m|rĂŠngĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:rĂŠngĂŠtero|rĂŠngĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:rĂŠngĂŠteshĂ«|rĂŠngĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:rĂŠngĂŠteshĂ«m|rĂŠngĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokirĂŠngĂŠtero|gokirĂŠngĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokirĂŠngĂŠteshĂ«|gokirĂŠngĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokirĂŠngĂŠteshĂ«m|gokirĂŠngĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gorĂŠngĂŠnkerom|gorĂŠngĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gorĂŠngĂŠnkeshĂ«|gorĂŠngĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gorĂŠngĂŠnkeshĂ«m|gorĂŠngĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gorĂŠngĂŠnkeya|gorĂŠngĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:rĂŠngĂŠterom|rĂŠngĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:rĂŠngĂŠtemu|rĂŠngĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:rĂŠngĂŠteya|rĂŠngĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokirĂŠngĂŠterom|gokirĂŠngĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokirĂŠngĂŠtemu|gokirĂŠngĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokirĂŠngĂŠteya|gokirĂŠngĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:rafngafte|rafngafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:rafngaftesher|rafngaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:rafngaftesherĂ«m|rafngaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:rafngaftero|rafngaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:rafngafteshĂ«|rafngafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:rafngafteshĂ«m|rafngafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokirafngaftero|gokirafngaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokirafngafteshĂ«|gokirafngafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokirafngafteshĂ«m|gokirafngafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gorafngafnkerom|gorafngafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gorafngafnkeshĂ«|gorafngafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gorafngafnkeshĂ«m|gorafngafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gorafngafnkeya|gorafngafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:rafngafterom|rafngafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:rafngaftemu|rafngaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:rafngafteya|rafngafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokirafngafterom|gokirafngafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokirafngaftemu|gokirafngaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokirafngafteya|gokirafngafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
